evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Agencia Notarial de Certificación . Unipersonal is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Spain. It provides digital trust services via ctnotariado.com.
